DECLARATION OF BAHRAM RAVANI, PH.D. REGARDING TRIAL UNAVAILABILITY (TRANSACTION ID # 70289538) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA AT&T CALIFORNIA (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "AT&T SERVICES, INC.")

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2024 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. JULIE AHN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF OVER THE PHONE. MICHAEL SAWAMURA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/22/24 IS CONTINUED TO 1/6/25 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. MR. SAWAMURA STATES THAT THERE'S A MEDIATION SCHEDULED ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. THERE WILL BE NO MORE FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE AND THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/6/25 WILL NOT BE CONTINUED. THERE HAVE BEEN 3 PRIOR CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
